# Aglow Portfolio Builder

> Corporate website built with Astro, Cloudflare Pages, and a custom visual Page Builder CMS.

## About
This is a high-performance corporate website with a drag-and-drop page builder.
Content is managed through an admin dashboard and rendered as static HTML with zero client-side JavaScript.

## Tech Stack
- Framework: Astro 5 (SSR mode)
- Hosting: Cloudflare Pages (Edge)
- Database: Cloudflare D1 (SQLite)
- Storage: Cloudflare R2
- Auth: Better Auth with RBAC

## Pages
All published pages are available at their respective slugs (e.g., /about, /services, /contact).
The sitemap is available at /sitemap-index.xml.

## Contact
For inquiries, please use the contact form on the website.
